design_direction: Editorial AI: Combining the high-end, heavy typography and stark minimalism of editorial fashion magazines with the ultra-clean, functional precision of Swiss-style tech interfaces. E-commerce products take center stage with massive breathing room, while AI features (Semantic Search, AI Assistant) stand out through high-contrast markers and Monospace typograpy.

typography.heading_strategy: Massive, expressive, tightly tracked. Avoid generic center-aligned blocks. Use font-light for elegance or font-black for impact. Do not use default bold.

colors.strategy: 95% of the UI should be monochrome to let product images breathe. Color exists ONLY to guide action, particularly for AI features (Semantic Search, AI Chatbot). Use International Klein Blue (#002FA7) as the kinetic trigger for AI-assisted flows.

visual_enhancers.surfaces: Use Glassmorphism (The Crystal Variant) for the sticky navigation and floating AI Shopping Assistant widget. Use Flat Solid backgrounds with sharp 1px borders for Admin Dashboards.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Ambient diffuse shadows for floating elements: shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.08)]. No soft shadows for standard layout blocks.
visual_enhancers.borders: Expose the grid in the Admin section using border-collapse styles. 1px solid borders.
visual_enhancers.animation: Smooth interactions. Micro-transitions on hover. Avoid 'transition: all'. Explicitly transition transform and opacity.
visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle noise overlay (opacity 2-3%) on hero sections to break digital flatness.

components.button_primary: Pill-shaped or sharp rectangular, bg-[#002FA7] text-white hover:bg-[#002280]. Labels must be uppercase and tracking-wide.
components.ai_chat_widget: Floating bottom-right. Glassmorphic panel, sharp typography, stark borders.
components.product_card: Cardless. Just the image, tight text below. No borders or shadows around the product card. Let the image be the shape.
components.admin_dashboard: High-density grid. No rounded corners. Functional, monochrome, high-contrast. Use Shadcn components heavily here.
components.search_bar: Massive, spanning multiple columns. 'Ask the AI to find...' placeholder. Focus state increases border width and drops a sharp shadow.
components.shadcn_customizations: Override default rounded corners to rounded-none or rounded-sm. Remove excessive default card shadows. Use Sonner for toasts.

layouts.spacing: Generous spacing philosophy: p-8 to p-16 for marketing sections. The AI often uses p-4; override this and multiply by 2.
layouts.home_page: Mode A: The Tetris Grid. Asymmetric, wide gaps (gap-8 or gap-12). Leave negative space intentionally.
layouts.product_listing: 2 to 3 column asymmetrical grid. Mix tall images (row-span-2) with square images.
layouts.product_detail_page: Split layout: Sticky product details on the right (w-1/3 or w-1/4), massive edge-to-edge scrollable images on the left.
layouts.admin: Mode B: High Density Grid. Tight gaps (gap-4). Every pixel utilized.

motion.entrance: Staggered fade-up for product grids and AI chat messages.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure APCA contrast ratio compliance. Text over images MUST have subtle text-shadow or a gradient overlay.
accessibility.test_ids: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='add-to-cart-button').

media.image_strategy: Products are hero. Images should be huge and unconstrained by standard card containers. Hero image max-h-[80vh] on mobile.

hero_model.description: Edgy editorial fashion model in black, use for main hero banner.

product_2.description: Modern black interior chair on white.

GENERAL_UI_UX_DESIGN_GUIDELINES: Design applies to .js React component files (not .tsx). Avoid any TypeScript specific type definitions.
Navigation MUST be visible on desktop. Never use a fully transparent header over hero images - apply glassmorphism or semi-solid background.
Form components, date pickers, dropdown menus MUST utilize customized Shadcn primitives rather than native HTML inputs.
Add 'data-testid' to ALL interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs) and key informational displays.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: DO NOT apply universal transition (e.g., transition: all). Add specific transitions.
DO NOT center align the app container. No '.App { text-align: center; }'.
Every interaction needs micro-animations (hover states, focus).
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Apply generous padding to containers.
Always explicitly set text color on hover.
instructions_to_main_agent: Implement an editorial-inspired e-commerce platform with prominent AI features using React (.js files). The visual language must be stark, monochrome (blending Serif and Monospace typography), with International Klein Blue (#002FA7) reserved strictly for primary CTA and AI integrations (chat, semantic search). Structure the project using React + Tailwind + Shadcn. Ensure all forms and admin tables use customized Shadcn primitives with border-radius removed or reduced. Implement data-testid on interactive elements.
